name: python3-anyio
title: python3-anyio
description:
Asynchronous compatibility layer
This module provides a bridge to run the same sources unmodified
on asyncio, curio and trio.
.
It bridges the following features:
- task groups
- cancellation
- threads
- signal handling
- asynchronous file operations
- subprocesses
- inter-task synchronization and communication
- high-level networking
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-anyio because Asynchronous compatibility layer.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-anyio as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-anyio with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-anyio --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
